blockers.description: outreach.signal_output does not exist in Neon. Function is deployed but returns blocker notice at runtime. Outreach hub must create and populate this table before bridge is operational.
blockers.expected_columns: id (UUID PK), sovereign_company_id (UUID), signal_code (TEXT), signal_category (TEXT), lifecycle_phase (TEXT), preferred_channel (TEXT), preferred_lane (TEXT), signal_data (JSONB), run_month (TEXT), priority (INTEGER)

notes: Function created and applied. Runtime guard ensures graceful no-op when source table is absent. Dual duplicate detection implemented per WP constraints. Existing bridge_pressure_signals() untouched.
